'''gadhutu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fibrinogenemia|fibrinogenemia]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-dh-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fibrinogenemia|fibrinogenemia]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| gadhutu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || gædhitith || gædhitij || gædhitish || gædhiti
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || gadhudhututh || gadhudhutuj || gadhudhutush || gadhudhutu
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || gadhututh || gadhutuj || gadhutush || gadhutu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || gadhuftufth || gadhuftufj || gadhuftufsh || gadhuftuf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || gadhututhu || gadhutuju || gadhutushu || gadhutuku
|-
| [[Patient]] || gadhututh || gadhutuj || gadhutush || gadhutu
|-
| [[Possessive]] || gadhututhul || gadhutujul || gadhutushul || gadhutukul
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || gadhutuuthuthu || gadhutuujuju || gadhutuushushu || gadhutuuku
|-
| [[Dative]] || gadhututhun || gadhutujun || gadhutushun || gadhutukun
|-
| [[Speaker]] || gadhututhuoro || gadhutujuoro || gadhutushuoro || gadhutukuoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
